title: Best Artisan Cookie — National Bakery Awards
desc: Judges cited the "unprecedented depth of flavor" in our Classic Chocolate Chunk, noting the 48-hour cold fermentation as "a technique more common in three-Michelin-star kitchens than cookie bakeries."

title: Small Business of the Year — Regional Chamber of Commerce
desc: Grew from 2 to 12 employees in 12 months while maintaining a 4.9-star average across 2,400+ reviews.

title: Reader's Choice — City Food Magazine
desc: Our Sea Salt Caramel cookie was voted "Dessert of the Year" by 12,000+ readers.

title: Sustainability Star — Green Kitchen Alliance
desc: Recognized for sourcing all chocolate from certified fair-trade cooperatives and using 100% compostable packaging.
